violations.text: Employee observed eating at the fish cutting board in room off sushi area. EMPLOYEEs shall eat, drink, or use any form of tobacco only in designated areas where the contamination of exposed FOOD; clean EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, and LINENS; unwrapped SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES; or other items needing protection can not result. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

A bucket of soapy water observed in the hand-washing sink in the cooking area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
Panko dated 6/22 observed with food debris from previous days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Open container of fish to be cut observed stored on the floor beneath dirty broom and umbrella in the room off the sushi area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor, and food must be protected from contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

Shrimp was observed thawing in stagnant on the drainboard of the food prep sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
Single-use items (tofu containers) observed being used for food preparation and storage. Single-use items shall not be reused. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

The floor around the grease trap in the basement has an accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Working containers (a spray bottle, and a large plastic container) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Reduced Oxygen Packaged (ROP) fish observed at 60 degrees, thawing with packaging intact. ROP fish must be removed from packaging before thawing. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Single-Use containers are being reused for food preparation and storage. Singele-use items shall not be reused. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The area around the grease trap in the basement has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris, along with liquid from foam coming out of top of unit.. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
